Lipid panel cost in California.

Cash-pay range for lipid panel across 47 hospitals in California: $11 to $542. CPT code 80061. Pulled from each hospital's federally-mandated price transparency file.

Cheapest in California
$11
Cedars-Sinai Medical Center
Los Angeles, CA
vs.
Most expensive in California
$542
Coast Plaza Hospital
Norwalk, CA

Data sources: CMS Hospital Price Transparency rule (45 CFR 180.50). CMS Hospital Care Compare (xubh-q36u). Last refresh: 2026-04-27.
A consumer reading of CMS-mandated MRF data. Not medical or financial advice. Itemized · itemized.health
